## Problem

<!-- What pain or opportunity is this addressing? Who benefits? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- A clear, concise description of what you want to happen. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them. -->

## Architectural impact

<!-- Does this require an ADR? Touch a public interface (env vars, namespaces, STAC properties)? -->

- [ ] Pure addition (no breaking change)
- [ ] Requires a new ADR
- [ ] Touches a public interface — needs migration plan
- [ ] Documentation-only

<!-- Links, mockups, related issues. If this is small enough to be an entry in `docs/FEATURE-IDEAS.md`, consider opening a PR there instead. -->
